hero.eyebrow: Chrome extension. One profile. Applications on autopilot.
hero.subheadline: exempliphai finds roles that match you, tailors your resume, autofills every field, and can submit applications for you. You stay in control. We do the busywork.
hero.privacyNote: Private by default. We never sell your data. You choose what gets submitted.

features.title: Your fastest path from search to interview.
features.subtitle: Stop spending nights copy and pasting. exempliphai automates the boring parts so you can apply early, apply more, and show up sharper in interviews.

items.title: Instant matches that respect your dealbreakers
items.description: Tell us role, location, and hard nos. exempliphai hunts continuously and shows only jobs worth your time.

items.title: Tailored resume in seconds
items.description: Create a job specific version, surface missing keywords, and keep your story consistent across applications.

items.title: Autofill everything, then apply in bulk
items.description: One profile powers every form. Reuse verified answers, avoid typos, and submit faster with fewer clicks.

items.title: List mode for apply sprints
items.description: Queue roles, tailor once per posting, then run a clean apply sprint. No tabs. No chaos.

items.title: Tracking that keeps you moving
items.description: Everything in one place: status, deadlines, notes, follow ups, and what you sent. Never lose a lead again.

items.title: Smarter answers that sound like you
items.description: Get posting specific talking points and answers for common questions so you stay consistent and credible.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Set it up once, then run daily apply sprints in minutes. Be early. Be consistent. Stop burning out.

steps.title: Build your private profile once
steps.description: Import your resume and set your targets. exempliphai saves your answers so every future application is faster.

steps.title: Find roles, fast
steps.description: Get a clean shortlist of roles that match your criteria. Apply early before the pile up.

steps.title: Tailor, then lock in your story
steps.description: Generate a tailored resume and get clear talking points for the questions recruiters actually ask.

steps.title: Apply in minutes and track automatically
steps.description: Autofill forms, reuse saved answers, and keep a clean tracker so follow ups are automatic, not forgotten.

testimonials.title: More applications. More replies. Less mental load.
testimonials.subtitle: exempliphai users apply earlier and at higher volume without turning job search into a second full time job.

items.quote: I used to spend my evenings on applications. Now I run a 20 minute sprint and I am done for the day.
items.name: Maya R.

items.quote: Autofill is the killer feature. Same answers, fewer mistakes, and I can actually apply to more than 10 jobs a day.
items.name: Jordan K.

items.quote: The tailored resume versions helped me stop getting auto rejected. It feels like I finally have leverage.
items.name: Sam T.

items.quote: List mode is addictive. Queue roles, tailor, apply, repeat. I got replies the first week.
items.name: Elena V.

items.quote: It filters out junk roles and keeps my dealbreakers. That alone saves me hours.
items.name: Chris P.

items.quote: Privacy first is rare in this space. No creepy ads following me around after I upload my resume.
items.name: Nina S.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: The honest answers before you install.

items.a: Yes. You can start free. We may introduce optional paid plans for advanced automation, higher volume, or premium AI features.
No. We do not sell your personal data. Your profile is private by default, and you control what gets submitted on your behalf.

items.q: Will it apply without me watching?
items.a: When auto apply is available, exempliphai can submit for you. You can always review and keep it in assisted mode if you prefer.

items.q: How is this different from other autofill tools?
items.a: Most tools stop at form fill. exempliphai goes end to end: match, tailor, answer, apply, then track so you can follow up.
No. You provide the source profile and answers. Tailoring keeps your experience accurate and relevant, not generic.

items.q: What do I need to get started?
items.a: Your resume and 5 minutes. Import once, set your targets, then run your first apply sprint.
